string.name: music_style
string.value: ancient Chinese orchestral, guzheng, erhu, dizi flute, pipa, traditional pentatonic scale, cinematic

string.name: sfx_style
string.value: realistic foley, historical weapon sounds, ancient battlefield, clean recording, no music

string.name: ambient_style
string.value: natural environment, field recording style, seamless loop, no music, subtle atmospheric

nodes.name: Suno - Generate Music
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create HTTP Header Auth credential with Name='Authorization' and Value='Bearer YOUR-SUNO-API-KEY'. Suno generates 2 clips per request. Rate limited to 1 req/10s.

nodes.name: ElevenLabs - Generate SFX
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create HTTP Header Auth credential with Name='xi-api-key' and Value='YOUR-ELEVENLABS-KEY'. Returns audio binary directly.

nodes.name: Stability Audio - Generate Ambient
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create HTTP Header Auth credential with Name='Authorization' and Value='Bearer sk-YOUR-STABILITY-KEY'. Returns audio binary.
